name: source-control
description: Unified Git source control — status, diff across all changed files, commit history, branches, bookmarks, and pull requests (when a forge is configured).
description_zh: 统一的 Git 源代码管理 —— 状态查看、所有修改文件的 diff、提交历史、分支、仓库书签,以及(配置远程 forge 后)的 PR 审查。

configSchema.label: Allowed Directories
configSchema.description: Comma-separated roots the panel may scan for Git repositories. All repo paths must resolve inside these roots.
configSchema.description_zh: 用逗号分隔的根目录,Source Control 会在其下扫描 .git 仓库。所有仓库路径必须位于这些根目录内。

configSchema.label: Git Binary
configSchema.description: Path or name of the git executable. Leave as 'git' to use the first on $PATH.
configSchema.description_zh: git 可执行文件路径或名称。留空或填 'git' 走 $PATH 首个命中。

configSchema.label: Diff Context Lines
configSchema.description: Unified diff context for the compact (default) view. Full-file context is available per-diff on demand.
configSchema.description_zh: 紧凑 diff 视图的上下文行数。按需可切换完整文件上下文。

configSchema.label: Commit Log Limit
configSchema.description: Maximum commits returned by History tab per request.
configSchema.description_zh: History 选项卡每次请求返回的最大提交数。

configSchema.label: Git Command Timeout (sec)
configSchema.description: Hard kill for each git subprocess. Large repos may need more.
configSchema.description_zh: 每个 git 子进程的硬超时时间。大型仓库可能需要调大。

configSchema.label: Render Markdown Preview
configSchema.description: For *.md files, also render HTML preview alongside the diff so documentation changes are easy to eyeball.
configSchema.description_zh: 针对 *.md 文件,在 diff 旁额外渲染 HTML 预览,便于快速查看文档变更。
